subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! By what means do the peoples of the world hold fast this day, and by what proof and testimony do they establish their truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین آیا اهل عالم الیوم بچه متمسکند و بچه حجت و برهان اثبات حق خود
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
